privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how DorPal ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website and services.
privacy.information_body: We may collect information that you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, booking details, and any other information you choose to provide when using our platform.
privacy.use_body: We use your information to provide and improve our services, manage your bookings, communicate with you, personalize your experience, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.sharing_body: We may share your information with service providers and business partners (such as salons and businesses you book with) only as needed to provide our services. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.security_body: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.rights_body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, update, or delete your personal information, or object to certain processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details provided on our website.
privacy.changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page and update the "Last updated" date below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the DorPal platform and services. By accessing or using our website or services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.use_body: You agree to use DorPal only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.bookings_body: DorPal connects you with independent businesses and service providers. Each provider may have its own booking, cancellation, and refund policies. It is your responsibility to review and comply with those policies when making a booking.
terms.liability_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, DorPal is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the platform or services, including any issues related to services provided by third-party businesses.
terms.changes_body: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time, with or without notice. We may also update these Terms from time to time, and the updated version will be effective when posted on this page.
terms.law_body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in your jurisdiction, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
